rationale.D1: No IO interfaces exist anywhere — subsystems (Shooter, Deploy, ShooterHood) directly instantiate and drive TalonFX motors; Hardware.java centralizes device creation which is a mild structural improvement over pure baseline, but there is no swappable IO layer.
rationale.D2: RobotManager extends StateMachineSubsystem<RobotState> with a real goal-request API (prepareScoreRequest, prepareFeedRequest, idleRequest), guarded transitions checking subsystem readiness, and fans out goals to all mechanisms in afterTransition/whileInState — confirmed in RobotManager.java; each mechanism also runs its own StateMachine.
rationale.D3: Custom SimKit library provides PositionMechanism (TrapezoidProfile-based CTRE sim), VelocityMechanism, and SimShooter; simulationPeriodic confirmed in Shooter.java, Deploy.java, and ShooterHood.java; no WPILib physics classes (ElevatorSim etc.) but real motor-state prediction is wired in for main mechanisms.
rationale.D4: 12 test files in shared/src/test/java with HAL-initialized JUnit5 tests including SimHooks timing (ConstraintsCalculatorTest), real assertions on path-follower math; CI workflow confirmed to run ./gradlew test on every push with Slack failure notification — tests gate the build.
rationale.D5: DogLog used pervasively throughout all subsystems with DogLog.log, DogLog.tunable for live NT tuning, and DogLog.logFault for fault reporting; configured in Base581Robot with file logging and NT publish in dev mode; not AdvantageKit — no processInputs/AutoLog pattern.
rationale.D6: Custom Trailblazer library with AutoSegmentBuilder, HeuristicPathTracker, constraint-aware path follower, marker-based autos, and AutoChooser with multiple named competition autos (RightNormalAuto, LeftNormalAuto, RightSpecialAuto); no PathPlanner or Choreo used.
rationale.D7: Three Limelights fused with std-dev weighted addVisionMeasurement in Localization.ingestTagResult(), PoseEstimateValidator rejection logic, TrustFactor with collision detection, MegaTag2 used; samplePoseAt timestamp lookup confirmed; no separate RobotState world model class or TimeInterpolatableBuffer for pose history.
rationale.D8: CI runs tests + spotless format check on every push with Slack alerts; docs/ directory includes patterns.md, subsystem-bringup-checklist, writing-subsystems.md; shared/ library carried across 4 robot variants (comp-bot, beta-bot, turret-bot, dumper-bot) in a monorepo; spotless + errorprone enforced.

D1: comp-bot/src/main/java/frc/robot/Hardware.java:37 — all devices instantiated centrally, no IO interface
